title: Login with valid user
steps: Open login page; Enter valid email and password; Click Sign in

title: Login with wrong password
steps: Open login page; Enter valid email and wrong password; Click Sign in
expected_result: Inline error shown and user stays on login

title: Checkout single click pay
steps: Add item to cart; Open checkout; Click Pay once
expected_result: Single charge created and confirmation shown

title: Upload profile image over limit
expected_result: Validation error with max size message
